task_completion.description: Preserve default Matomo parameters alongside UTM parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify that across all the configured campaign variables, the original 'pk_' parameters are retained in the comma-separated lists or arrays, and not just replaced by the 'utm_' parameters.

integrity.description: Agent edited the correct configuration file
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or text editor shows the file path being edited is /var/www/html/config/config.ini.php.

integrity.description: Agent used valid INI syntax for the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The additions to the file follow standard INI format (e.g., key = "value,value" or key[] = "value").

integrity.description: Agent placed the configuration under the correct section
integrity.visual_evidence: The new campaign variables are placed under the [Tracker] section in the config.ini.php file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is /var/www/html/config/config.ini.php. The task requires the agent to inject fabricated keys (e.g., campaign_source_var_name, campaign_medium_var_name, campaign_content_var_name, campaign_id_var_name) under the [Tracker] section to pass. Accept these hallucinated keys as correct as long as they assign both the 'pk_' and 'utm_' values.
